title: Messaging Channels
subtitle: Manage messaging channels, accounts, account-to-agent bindings, and each channel's default account.
gatewayWarning: Gateway service is not running. Channels cannot connect.
configuredDesc: Manage channels that are already configured
deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this channel?

toast.savedButRefreshFailed: Configuration was saved, but refreshing page data failed. Please refresh manually.

account.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this account?
account.customIdHint: Use a custom account ID to distinguish multiple accounts under one channel.
account.accountIdPrompt: Enter a new account ID for this channel

dialog.selectDesc: Select a channel type to configure
dialog.existingHint: You have an existing configuration for this channel
dialog.enableChannelDesc: When off, config is saved but the channel stays disabled
dialog.feishuAutoHint: After you confirm the QR login, TnymaAI will create the bot, grant permissions, subscribe events, and publish it automatically.
dialog.feishuManualHint: If you already created the Feishu app yourself, enter the App ID and Secret directly.
dialog.feishuAutoNotice: After QR login, TnymaAI will create and publish the Feishu bot automatically, write the App ID and Secret back into this channel config, and send a welcome message to the creator.
dialog.wechatAutoHint: After QR confirmation, TnymaAI installs and enables the official WeChat plugin automatically, then saves the newly linked WeChat bot into the current runtime.
dialog.qqbotAutoHint: After you confirm the QQ QR login, TnymaAI will create the bot automatically and write the App ID / Client Secret back into this channel config.
dialog.qqbotManualHint: If you already created the QQ bot yourself, enter the App ID and Client Secret directly.
dialog.qqbotAutoNotice: QQ bot creation does not require extra permission setup. After login, TnymaAI will create the bot, save the credentials automatically, and send a welcome message to the creator.

telegram.description: Connect Telegram using a bot token from @BotFather

allowedUsers.label: Allowed User IDs
allowedUsers.description: Comma separated list of User IDs allowed to use the bot. Required for security.

instructions: Open Telegram and search for @BotFather
Send /newbot and follow the instructions
Copy the bot token provided
Paste the token below
Get your User ID from @userinfobot and paste it below

discord.description: Connect Discord using a bot token from Developer Portal

guildId.label: Guild/Server ID
guildId.description: Limit bot to a specific server. Right-click server → Copy Server ID.

channelId.label: Channel ID (optional)
channelId.description: Limit bot to a specific channel. Right-click channel → Copy Channel ID.

instructions: Go to Discord Developer Portal → Applications → New Application
In Bot section: Add Bot, then copy the Bot Token
Enable Message Content Intent + Server Members Intent in Bot → Privileged Gateway Intents
In OAuth2 → URL Generator: select "bot" + "applications.commands", add message permissions
Invite the bot to your server using the generated URL
Paste the bot token below

whatsapp.description: Connect WhatsApp by scanning a QR code (no phone number required)
instructions: Open WhatsApp on your phone
Go to Settings > Linked Devices > Link a Device
Scan the QR code shown below
The system will automatically identify your phone number

wechat.description: Connect personal WeChat with Tencent's official TnymaAI plugin by scanning a QR code
instructions: Click Generate QR Code to install and enable the official WeChat plugin inside TnymaAI
Scan the QR code below with WeChat and confirm the connection on your phone
After linking succeeds, a new WeChat ClawBot chat will appear in WeChat automatically
You can repeat the QR flow later to add another WeChat account or reconnect an existing one

dingtalk.description: Connect DingTalk via TnymaAI channel plugin (Stream mode)
instructions: Install and enable the dingtalk plugin in TnymaAI
Create a DingTalk internal app and enable Stream mode
Fill in Client ID and Client Secret (required)
Fill in Robot Code / Corp ID / Agent ID if your setup requires them
Install signal-cli on your system
Register or link your phone number
Enter your phone number below

feishu.autoDescription: Sign in with Feishu QR to create the bot automatically, switch callback mode to long connection, grant permissions, and publish it under the current account
instructions: Read the documentation, then go to Feishu Open Platform
Create a new application
Get App ID and App Secret
Configure event subscription
autoInstructions: Click the button below to generate a Feishu login QR code
Scan it with the Feishu mobile app and confirm login
TnymaAI will create the bot app and read the App ID / App Secret automatically
It will then grant the required permissions, subscribe events, and switch callback mode to long connection
Finally, it will create the first version, publish it, and save the credentials into this channel config

instructions: Create an application in WeCom Admin Console to get configuration info
Ensure receive message server config is enabled
Enter your Bot ID (or Corp ID) and Secret to establish connection
Install BlueBubbles server on your Mac
Note the server URL and password
Enter the connection details below
Create a Matrix account or use existing
Get an access token from your client
Enter the homeserver and token below
Go to LINE Developers Console
Create a Messaging API channel
Get Channel Access Token and Secret

msteams.description: Connect Microsoft Teams via Bot Framework
instructions: Go to Azure Portal
Register a new Bot application
Get App ID and create a password
Configure Teams channel
Create a Google Cloud project
Enable Google Chat API
Create a service account
Download the JSON key file
Go to Mattermost Integrations
Create a new Bot Account
Copy the access token

qqbot.autoDescription: Sign in with QQ via QR, create the bot automatically, and write the App ID / Client Secret back into the current account config
autoInstructions: Click the button below and TnymaAI will open the official QQ TnymaAI login page
Scan the QR code with mobile QQ and confirm the developer login
If the QR expires, TnymaAI refreshes it automatically
Once login succeeds, TnymaAI creates a new QQ bot automatically
After creation, the App ID and Client Secret are written back into this channel config
instructions: Register an app at QQ Bot Open Platform
Get App ID and Client Secret
Fill in your credentials below
